positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration featuring a stylized arrangement of celestial objects: a crescent moon partially visible behind a cluster of blooming, geometric flora and a whimsical, stylized nebula cloud. The composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, using clean, bold lines and flat color areas reminiscent of modern scientific posters or vintage mid-century travel posters. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, burnt orange, cream white, and teal. The design must be highly scalable and silhouette-friendly, with crisp edges, clean negative space, and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art style, perfect symmetry, highly detailed flora, ethereal glow from the nebula, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, low detail, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, gradient, bokeh, cinematic, photo, 3d render, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, grain
